Package org.eventb.internal.core.preferences

Class PreferenceMapper<T>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.preferences.PreferenceMapper<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMapRefSolver<T>, IPrefElementTranslator<Map<String,T>>
public class PreferenceMapper<T> extends Object implements IPrefElementTranslator<Map<String,T>>, IMapRefSolver<T>
Maps a preference to a Map.

  • Method Details

    • inject

      public Map<String,T> inject(String pref, IInjectLog log)
      Returns a map of objects corresponding to the preference.
      Specified by:
      inject in interface IPrefElementTranslator<T>
      Parameters:
      pref - the string of the preference representing the map
      log - a log to collect injection errors and warnings
      Returns:
      a object map corresponding to the preference

    • loadUnit

      private IPrefMapEntry<T> loadUnit(NodeList units, int i, String pref, InjectLog log)

    • extract

      public String extract(Map<String,T> map)
      Extracts the map model to string for serialization.
      Specified by:
      extract in interface IPrefElementTranslator<T>
      Parameters:
      map - the map to extract
      Returns:
      a string representing the extracted map

    • resolveReferences

      public void resolveReferences(CachedPreferenceMap<T> map, IInjectLog log)
      Description copied from interface: IMapRefSolver
      Replaces the reference placeholders, contained in the given preference, by actual references obtained from the given map.
      Specified by:
      resolveReferences in interface IMapRefSolver<T>
      Parameters:
      map - a preference map
      log - a log to add warnings about unresolved references

    • mapEntryToString

      private String mapEntryToString(String key, T value)
      Returns a string representing the given key and value of an element of a map.
      Parameters:
      key - key with which the specified value is associated
      value - value associated with the specified key
